dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: White and mint base layout preview

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: The base layout now uses a top bar, a foldable left drawer, and bordered content panels.

activity.title: Recent work
activity.description: Use the data table sample and chart sample pages to validate expanded content areas.

status.title: Status
status.description: Both light and dark themes keep mint as the primary accent and avoid unnecessary gradients.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Review account details and authentication status.
settings.profileDescription: The same edit dialog is also available from the top profile menu.
settings.securityDescription: Google sign-in becomes available after Supabase is connected.

profileErrors.auth: We could not update the account information.
profileErrors.duplicate: This account information is already in use.
profileErrors.security: The security token is invalid. Refresh the page and try again.

accountErrors.validation: Please review the account deletion request.
accountErrors.security: The security token is invalid. Refresh the page and try again.
accountErrors.service-role: A server-side Supabase key is required to delete accounts.
accountErrors.delete: We could not complete the account deletion.

googleErrors.security: The security token is invalid. Refresh the page and try again.
googleErrors.unavailable: Google account linking is available only with Supabase authentication.
googleErrors.link: We could not start Google account linking.
googleErrors.unlink: We could not unlink the Google account.
googleErrors.missing: No linked Google account was found.
googleErrors.single-identity: Google cannot be unlinked because it is the only sign-in method.

settings.providerFallback: Supabase checks failed {attempts} times. The app is running with Local JSON auth.

securityItems.google: Google sign-in available after Supabase setup
securityItems.mfa: JWT sessions and CSRF token verification are enabled

googleIdentity.title: Google account linking
googleIdentity.linked: Google sign-in is linked to this account.
googleIdentity.notLinked: Google sign-in is not linked to this account.
googleIdentity.unavailable: Google linking is unavailable in local JSON mode or without Supabase setup.

auth.title: KMSF Sign In
auth.confirmEmail: Please verify your email and sign in again.
auth.registered: Your account has been created. Please sign in.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session ended after one hour of inactivity. Please sign in again.
auth.settingsReset: Settings reset is complete. Please sign in again.

errors.auth: The ID or password is incorrect.
errors.oauth: Google sign-in is available after Supabase setup.
errors.locked: Multiple login attempts failed. You cannot sign in for {seconds} seconds.
errors.security: The security token is invalid. Refresh the page and try again.

tooltips.username: Use 5-32 letters, numbers, or an email-style ID.
tooltips.password: Use 6-32 characters with letters, numbers, and special characters.

username.invalid: The ID must be 5-32 letters, numbers, or an email-style value.

password.invalid: The password must be 6-32 characters and include letters, numbers, and special characters.

initialSetup.title: KMSF Initial Setup
initialSetup.description: Configure the project auth mode and first administrator account.

provider.title: Initial setup
provider.description: Choose the auth and data storage mode this KMSF project should use.
provider.fallbackNotice: Supabase checks failed {attempts} times. Setup will continue with Local DB.

supabase.title: Supabase setup
supabase.description: Use Supabase Auth and the manager table to manage accounts and sessions.
supabase.unavailable: Supabase environment variables or Auth connectivity could not be verified, so setup will use Local DB.

local.title: Local DB setup
local.description: Use a lowdb-backed JSON DB under the server .local directory for Supabase fallback, development, and offline verification accounts.

serverDb.title: Server DB integration
serverDb.description: ODBC and installed server DB integrations are planned only. Initial setup does not select or persist them yet; they remain a later adapter.

layout.title: GNB settings
layout.description: Choose the GNB regions for the initial project framework. TOP, Left Side, and Footer are selected by default.

top.title: TOP
top.description: Show brand, primary navigation, and utility buttons in the top header.

left.title: Left Side
left.description: Show collapsible primary navigation and the account menu in the left aside.

right.title: Right Side
right.description: Show a right side region as a secondary GNB area.

footer.title: Footer
footer.description: Show server time and bottom GNB in the footer region.

admin.title: Admin account
admin.description: Enter the first account that will manage KMSF.

errors.auth: We could not create the initial administrator account.
errors.security: The security token is invalid. Refresh the page and try again.

tooltips.username: Use 5-32 letters, numbers, or an email-style ID.
tooltips.displayName: The administrator name shown in settings and profile menus.
tooltips.password: Use 6-32 characters with letters, numbers, and special characters.
tooltips.passwordConfirm: Re-enter the same password once more.

username.invalid: The ID must be 5-32 letters, numbers, or an email-style value.
username.duplicate: This ID is already in use.

displayName.invalid: The name must be 2-40 characters long.

email.duplicate: This E-mail is already in use.

password.invalid: The password must be 6-32 characters and include letters, numbers, and special characters.

passwordConfirm.invalid: The password confirmation must be at least 6 characters long.

signUp.title: Create Account
signUp.description: Create a Supabase account and sign in.

errors.auth: The current Supabase configuration does not allow sign up.
errors.security: The security token is invalid. Refresh the page and try again.

tooltips.username: Use 5-32 letters, numbers, or an email-style ID.
tooltips.password: Use 6-32 characters with letters, numbers, and special characters.
tooltips.passwordConfirm: Re-enter the same password once more.

username.invalid: The ID must be 5-32 letters, numbers, or an email-style value.
username.duplicate: This ID is already in use.

email.duplicate: This E-mail is already in use.

password.invalid: The password must be 6-32 characters and include letters, numbers, and special characters.
